Container.Name: YAHLP-Full
Container.Description: YAHLP - Complete Master Template with ALL configuration options
Container.Overview: YAHLP - Yet Another HomeLab Portal. Complete template with all 19 services and comprehensive configuration options.

Config.Name: Test Mode
Config.Description: Enable test/debug mode. Set to 'true' to prevent Let's Encrypt rate limiting during setup.

Config.Name: Access Mode
Config.Description: Choose 'private' for HTTP only on internal network, or 'public' for HTTPS with Let's Encrypt.

Config.Name: Domain (Public Only)
Config.Description: Your domain name for public mode (e.g., media.example.com). Leave blank for private mode.

Config.Name: Email (Public Only)
Config.Description: Email for SSL certificate notifications. Required for public mode.

Config.Name: IP Address (Private Only)
Config.Description: Server IP for private mode (e.g., 192.168.1.100). Leave blank for auto-assign.

Config.Name: Dashboard Title
Config.Description: Name displayed in dashboard header and browser title.

Config.Name: Dashboard Color
Config.Description: Primary color in hex format (e.g., #00A99D). Sets dashboard accent color.

Config.Name: Dashboard Layout
Config.Description: Choose layout: classic, modern, storm, storm-violet, neon, focus, vixens, minimal. Append ':only' to lock layout (e.g., modern:only).

Config.Name: Service Display Order
Config.Description: Comma-separated service codes. Order: USENET (SAB, GET, HYD), TORRENTS (TRA, QBI, DEL), SEARCH (PRO, JAC, SON, RAD, LID, WHI), INFRA (SEE, BAZ, TAU, MNT), MEDIA (JEL, PLX, EMB).

Config.Name: Landing Page
Config.Description: Default page on load (e.g., sonarr/calendar, radarr/upcoming). Leave blank to show dashboard grid.

Config.Name: Authentication Type
Config.Description: Choose: 'none' (no auth), 'basic' (username/password), 'google' (Google OAuth), 'entra' (Microsoft Entra ID).

Config.Name: Basic Auth Credentials
Config.Description: Format: user:pass or user1:pass1|user2:pass2 for multiple users. Only used if AUTHTYPE=basic.

Config.Name: Google Client ID
Config.Description: From Google Cloud Console. Only used if AUTHTYPE=google.

Config.Name: Google Client Secret
Config.Description: From Google Cloud Console. Only used if AUTHTYPE=google.

Config.Name: Google Redirect URI
Config.Description: OAuth callback URL (e.g., https://yourdomain.com/auth/oauth2/callback). Only used if AUTHTYPE=google.

Config.Name: Entra Client ID
Config.Description: From Azure Portal. Only used if AUTHTYPE=entra.

Config.Name: Entra Client Secret
Config.Description: From Azure Portal. Only used if AUTHTYPE=entra.

Config.Name: Entra Tenant ID
Config.Description: Your Azure Tenant ID. Only used if AUTHTYPE=entra.

Config.Name: Entra Redirect URI
Config.Description: OAuth callback URL (e.g., https://yourdomain.com/auth/oauth2/callback). Only used if AUTHTYPE=entra.

Config.Name: Entra Crypto Passphrase
Config.Description: Encryption passphrase for Entra tokens. Only used if AUTHTYPE=entra.

Config.Name: Entra Metadata URL
Config.Description: OpenID metadata URL for Entra. Only used if AUTHTYPE=entra.

Config.Name: Enable SABNZBD
Config.Description: Enable SABnzbd usenet client.

Config.Name: SABnzbd URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: SABnzbd API Key
Config.Description: Get from SABnzbd: Config → General → API Key.

Config.Name: SABnzbd Icon URL
Config.Description: Custom icon URL. Leave blank to use bundled icon.

Config.Name: Enable NZBGET
Config.Description: Enable NZBget usenet client.

Config.Name: NZBget URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: NZBget Username
Config.Description: NZBget username for authentication.

Config.Name: NZBget Password
Config.Description: NZBget password for authentication.

Config.Name: NZBget Icon URL
Config.Description: Custom icon URL. Leave blank to use bundled icon.

Config.Name: Enable NZBHYDRA
Config.Description: Enable NZBHydra2 usenet meta-search.

Config.Name: NZBHydra URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: NZBHydra API Key
Config.Description: Get from NZBHydra: Config → Main → API Key.

Config.Name: NZBHydra Icon URL
Config.Description: Custom icon URL. Leave blank to use bundled icon.

Config.Name: Enable TRANSMISSION
Config.Description: Enable Transmission torrent client.

Config.Name: Transmission URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: Transmission Icon URL
Config.Description: Custom icon URL. Leave blank to use bundled icon.

Config.Name: Enable QBITTORRENT
Config.Description: Enable qBittorrent torrent client.

Config.Name: qBittorrent URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: qBittorrent API Key
Config.Description: Get from qBittorrent: Tools → Options → Web UI → API Token.

Config.Name: qBittorrent Icon URL
Config.Description: Custom icon URL. Leave blank to use bundled icon.

Config.Name: Enable DELUGE
Config.Description: Enable Deluge torrent client.

Config.Name: Deluge URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: Deluge Password
Config.Description: Deluge WebUI password.

Config.Name: Deluge Icon URL
Config.Description: Custom icon URL. Leave blank to use bundled icon.

Config.Name: Enable PROWLARR
Config.Description: Enable Prowlarr indexer manager.

Config.Name: Prowlarr URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: Prowlarr API Key
Config.Description: Get from Prowlarr: Settings → General → API Key.

Config.Name: Prowlarr Icon URL
Config.Description: Custom icon URL. Leave blank to use bundled icon.

Config.Name: Enable JACKETT
Config.Description: Enable Jackett indexer aggregator.

Config.Name: Jackett URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: Jackett API Key
Config.Description: Get from Jackett: Admin → Dashboard → API Key.

Config.Name: Jackett Icon URL
Config.Description: Custom icon URL. Leave blank to use bundled icon.

Config.Name: Enable Sonarr
Config.Description: Enable Sonarr TV series automation.

Config.Name: Sonarr URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: Sonarr API Key
Config.Description: Get from Sonarr: Settings → General → API Key.

Config.Name: Sonarr Icon URL
Config.Description: Custom icon URL. Leave blank to use bundled icon.

Config.Name: Enable Radarr
Config.Description: Enable Radarr movie automation.

Config.Name: Radarr URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: Radarr API Key
Config.Description: Get from Radarr: Settings → General → API Key.

Config.Name: Radarr Icon URL
Config.Description: Custom icon URL. Leave blank to use bundled icon.

Config.Name: Enable Lidarr
Config.Description: Enable Lidarr music automation.

Config.Name: Lidarr URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: Lidarr API Key
Config.Description: Get from Lidarr: Settings → General → API Key.

Config.Name: Lidarr Icon URL
Config.Description: Custom icon URL. Leave blank to use bundled icon.

Config.Name: Enable Whisparr
Config.Description: Enable Whisparr audiobook automation.

Config.Name: Whisparr URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: Whisparr API Key
Config.Description: Get from Whisparr: Settings → General → API Key.

Config.Name: Whisparr Icon URL
Config.Description: Custom icon URL. Leave blank to use bundled icon.

Config.Name: Enable SEERR
Config.Description: Enable Seerr media requests.

Config.Name: Seerr URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: Seerr API Key
Config.Description: Get from Seerr: Settings → API Keys.

Config.Name: Seerr Icon URL
Config.Description: Custom icon URL. Leave blank to use bundled icon.

Config.Name: Enable Bazarr
Config.Description: Enable Bazarr subtitle manager.

Config.Name: Bazarr URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: Bazarr Icon URL
Config.Description: Custom icon URL. Leave blank to use bundled icon.

Config.Name: Enable Tautulli
Config.Description: Enable Tautulli Plex analytics.

Config.Name: Tautulli URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: Tautulli API Key
Config.Description: Get from Tautulli: Settings → Web Interface → API Key.

Config.Name: Tautulli Icon URL
Config.Description: Custom icon URL. Leave blank to use bundled icon.

Config.Name: Enable Maintainerr
Config.Description: Enable Maintainerr media server maintenance.

Config.Name: Maintainerr URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: Maintainerr Icon URL
Config.Description: Custom icon URL. Leave blank to use bundled icon.

Config.Name: Enable Jellyfin
Config.Description: Enable Jellyfin media server.

Config.Name: Jellyfin URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: Jellyfin Icon URL
Config.Description: Custom icon URL. Leave blank to use bundled icon.

Config.Name: Enable Plex
Config.Description: Enable Plex media server.

Config.Name: Plex URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: Plex Icon URL
Config.Description: Custom icon URL. Leave blank to use bundled icon.

Config.Name: Enable Emby
Config.Description: Enable Emby media server.

Config.Name: Emby URL
Config.Description: Internal Docker URL. Format: http://container-name:port

Config.Name: Emby Icon URL
Config.Description: Custom icon URL. Leave blank to use bundled icon.
